original: A tasty packaged meal from the Barbeque Pit on New Texas, this ever-fresh BBQ meal comes with fries and soda. Probably not great for your figure, but it’s guaranteed to give you a boost of energy in the middle of a long day at the office... or of galactic adventuring.
Using supplements to heal yourself will only work once per fight. No body can handle the metabolic strain of downing multiple regenerative items in such quick succession.
{var0}+{var1}+" has already healed during this fight! Doing so again would be more than ill-advised!

original: You pop open the packaged BBQ To-Go meal and quickly munch down a nice, hot, fresh-tasting roast beef sandwich and fries, washing it down with a swig of sweet bottled orange soda. Delicious!
